metadata.title: Xpandia | Spanish-English Language Assurance & Applied Cultural Intelligence
metadata.description: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt high-impact Spanish and English experiences through expert human review, quality evidence, and cultural insight.
metadata.ogTitle: Xpandia | Spanish-English Language Assurance & Applied Cultural Intelligence
metadata.ogDescription: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt high-impact Spanish and English experiences through expert human review, quality evidence, and cultural insight.

hero.eyebrow: SPANISH EXPERTISE · LANGUAGE ASSURANCE · CULTURAL INTELLIGENCE
hero.subheadline: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, and product teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt their digital experiences for English and Spanish-speaking audiences.

proof.label: 20+ YEARS
proof.text: Global localization and language quality experience.

proof.label: SPANISH & ENGLISH FOCUS
proof.text: LatAm, Spain, US and regional variants.

proof.label: BUILT FOR
proof.text: AI, Product, Localization, CX, Marketing, and EdTech teams.

positioning.headline: Language quality is product quality.
positioning.body1: AI and automated translation can get Spanish most of the way there. But "mostly accurate" is not always enough when language affects trust, conversion, customer experience, or product adoption.
positioning.body2: Xpandia operates in that last mile between understandable Spanish and Spanish that is ready for real users. We help teams validate, improve, and deliver Spanish experiences that are accurate, clear, natural, culturally aware, and aligned with the way users think, decide, and act.
positioning.body3: For companies where Spanish quality directly affects UX, CX, trust, and revenue, Xpandia turns expert human judgment into the evidence, recommendations, and improvements needed to move from "good enough" to ready.
positioning.calloutLine: The three ways Xpandia makes Spanish work in the real world.

servicesOverview.headline: Identify the problem your team needs to solve.
servicesOverview.intro: Xpandia helps teams validate the quality of existing experiences, improve what needs attention, and understand the target audience behind the language.

cards.title: Language Assurance
cards.tagline: Validate your Spanish and English before your users do.
cards.description: Structured audits and QA sprints for AI outputs, product flows, support content, launch readiness, and ongoing Spanish quality decisions.
cards.bestFor: Teams already operating in Spanish and English or preparing to launch with AI outputs, localized content, product experiences, or customer journeys and need to know whether they are accurate, natural, consistent, culturally appropriate, and ready for users.
cards.whatYouGet: Decision-ready evidence: quality scorecards, issue taxonomies, severity ratings, prioritized fixes, and clear recommendations to help your team improve language quality and make the experience user-ready.

cards.title: Language Experience Repair & Adaptation
cards.tagline: Turn just-translated content into user-ready experiences.
cards.description: Expert repair, custom adaptation, and localization of high-impact Spanish/English content, AI or MT outputs, product copy, support content, messaging, and customer-facing experiences.
cards.bestFor: Teams with existing Spanish content, AI-generated outputs, machine-translated copy, product copy, support materials, or marketing assets that need to feel clearer, more natural, more consistent, and better aligned with the audience.
cards.whatYouGet: Improved Spanish/English copy, AI/MT output repair, rewrite recommendations, terminology guidance, tone notes, regional fit guidance, and QA-ready or publication-ready assets.

cards.title: Applied Cultural Intelligence
cards.tagline: Make better decisions with cultural context.
cards.description: Talks, briefings, workshops, and advisory that help leaders and global teams strengthen Cultural Intelligence, understand English and Spanish-speaking audiences, avoid cultural friction, and make better product, market, communication, and people decisions.
cards.bestFor: Leadership, Product, Marketing, CX, People, Localization, and Global Operations teams that need to work across cultures, enter new markets, improve team effectiveness, or understand the invisible norms that shape trust, behavior, and business outcomes.
cards.whatYouGet: Practical CQ frameworks, culturalization guidance, audience-specific insights, cultural friction analysis, messaging guidance, executive briefings, team workshops, and action-ready next steps.

methodology.headline: The method behind Spanish that works
methodology.intro: Every engagement is designed and follows a rigorous process to help your team understand what is working, what needs attention, why it matters, and what to do next.

steps.title: Define
steps.body: We clarify your product, audience, Spanish variant, content surface, business goal, timeline, and what "good" needs to mean for your team.

steps.title: Evaluate
steps.body: We review language, meaning, tone, terminology, clarity, cultural fit, UX friction, audience expectations, and quality risks using expert human judgment and structured criteria.

steps.title: Prioritize
steps.body: We separate critical issues from quick wins and organize findings by severity, business impact, and implementation effort.

steps.title: Improve
steps.body: We deliver recommendations, rewrites, standards, scorecards, examples, and next steps your team can act on.

deliverables.headline: Evidence your team can act on.
deliverables.body: Every Xpandia engagement turns expert judgment into practical evidence: scorecards, findings, examples, recommendations, and decision-ready guidance.

cards.title: Quality Scorecard
cards.body: Measurable scoring across the criteria that matter for your use case: accuracy, clarity, naturalness, tone, terminology, regional fit, cultural fit, UX friction, readiness, and risk.

cards.title: Issue Taxonomy
cards.body: A structured view of what is affecting quality, where it happens, how severe it is, and what your team should fix first.

cards.title: Remediation Guidance
cards.body: Practical recommendations, rewrites, examples, terminology notes, and standards to help your team improve Spanish quality without slowing down delivery.

cards.title: Executive Readout
cards.body: A concise summary for Product, AI, Localization, CX, Marketing, or leadership teams with risks, opportunities, and recommended next steps.

scorecard.title: Quality Scorecard
scorecard.footer: OUTPUT SAMPLE · USE CASE: SUPPORT COPILOT · VARIANT: es-MX · REVIEWER: XPANDIA SENIOR

builtFor.headline: Teams building products and experiences in Spanish and English.

cards.title: AI & ML Product Teams
cards.body: Validate Spanish and English outputs from chatbots, tutors, copilots, agents, and generative AI experiences before users rely on them.

cards.title: SaaS & Product Teams
cards.body: Improve Spanish and English product flows, onboarding, UI copy, forms, errors, and launch readiness.

cards.title: Localization Teams
cards.body: Strengthen Spanish and English quality, reviewer alignment, terminology, vendor oversight, and sign-off decisions.

cards.title: CX & Support Teams
cards.body: Improve Spanish and English help content, support macros, chatbot responses, and customer-facing communication.

cards.title: Marketing & Growth Teams
cards.body: Adapt messaging, landing pages, campaigns, CTAs, and conversion copy for English and Spanish-speaking audiences.

cards.title: EdTech Teams
cards.body: Make Spanish and English learning experiences clear, natural, culturally relevant, and pedagogically effective.

buyer.headline: Built for the leaders responsible for Spanish quality.

finalCta.headline: Know where your Spanish stands — and what to do
finalCta.body: In a focused diagnostic call, we review your Spanish surface, audience, product context, timeline, and business goal, and then, if applicable, we recommend the right path forward: an audit, AI QA sprint, Spanish repair engagement, ACI talk, messaging review, or quality advisory path.

aiEcosystem.headline: AI models and platforms we validate and optimize.
aiEcosystem.intro: We do more than just review text; we deeply understand the automation, content generation, and low-code development environments where you build your products. We ensure the outputs of your agents, prompts, and integrated workflows are seamless, natural, and conversion-ready.
